Professional Profile

I audit and automate business processes with AI — apps, integrations and solutions that remove repetitive work. I design AI-agent systems, automations (n8n, Python, MCP) and social media pipelines. Audit → prototype → deployment. Business background: 3 years in premium customer service (Domoteka showroom) plus stage experience (theatre, film, workshops) help me translate technology into business language. Open to employment or B2B — registered sole proprietorship. Remote · PL/EU.
